crowd_flee_system.description: Crowd agents flee when T-Rex enters CHASE state

crowd_scatter_system.description: Crowd agents scatter when Raptor AMBUSH or FLANK triggers activate

fire_safety_cluster.description: At night, crowd agents move toward fire sources for safety — fire deters predators

trex_patrol_exclusion.description: No crowd agents idle within T-Rex patrol loop — defines hard exclusion boundary

day_night_density_system.description: Crowd density shifts with time of day — night reduces active agents, increases shelter-seeking

stampede_system.description: Brachiosaurus stampede triggered by loud noise within 500u — pushes crowd agents out of path with physics impulse

processors: CrowdFleeProcessor — reacts to combat zone state changes
CrowdScatterProcessor — radial burst on raptor ambush
CrowdStampedeProcessor — physics impulse from Brachio path
CrowdPathfindingProcessor — routes around T-Rex exclusion zone

quest_triggers_available: CrowdFlee_TRex_North/South/East — can trigger 'Survive T-Rex Attack' quest objective
CrowdScatter_Raptor_Ambush_W/E — can trigger 'Raptor Pack Ambush' quest event
StampedePath_Start → End — can trigger 'Survive the Stampede' quest sequence
CrowdSafety_Fire_Camp_001/002/003 — can trigger 'Build a Fire' quest objective (safety mechanic)
narrative_hooks: Crowd fleeing T-Rex creates urgency — player must react within 8 seconds
Fire safety clusters show player that fire = protection — teaches crafting motivation
Stampede path creates linear 'run for your life' sequence — cinematic moment
Night density reduction creates tension — fewer allies visible, more isolated feeling
